name: Asparagus Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 Whole broiler-fryer chicken breasts, boned and cut into pieces
2 slices ginger root (equivalent to 1/4 teaspoon ground ginger)
1 pound asparagus (fresh or frozen), cut into 1 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon of corn oil and ginger in a Teflon pan over medium heat.
2. Add seasoned chicken and stir-fry until cooked through and white, about 3 to 5 minutes.
3. Remove chicken from the pan and cover it with foil to keep warm.
4. Discard ginger root if fresh ginger was used.
5. Add remaining 1 tablespoon of corn oil to the pan.
6. Stir-fry asparagus (excluding tips) for about 2 minutes.
7. Add asparagus tips, onions, and mushrooms, stirring constantly for 1 to 2 minutes until asparagus is bright green.
8. Return chicken to the pan and heat covered for about 1 minute or until asparagus is tender-crisp.
9. Season to taste.
Yield: 4 servings, 335 calories each.
